pageContext.name: Bolo Yeung: Jeet Kune Do Tribute
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Premium Collectibles Studio present the Bolo Yeung: Jeet Kune Do Tribute 1:3 Scale Statue.  The Bolo Yeung: Jeet Kune Do Tribute 1:3 Scale Statue measures 23 tall and 19.5 wide as an expertly sculpted homage to the renowned Chinese actor, bodybuilder, and martial artist famed for his antagonistic action movie roles. This ultra-realistic and highly detailed statue showcases the athleticism, intensity, and immense discipline exhibited by Yeung in early film appearances that made him a fan-favorite on-screen fighter.  Inspired by an iconic era of his prolific career, the Bolo Yeung: Jeet Kune Do Tribute 1:3 Statue is a mixed media collectible with a fully sculpted athletic physique costumed with white fabric gi pants and a black fabric belt to signify his martial arts accomplishments. As a practitioner of Jeet Kune Do, a martial arts philosophy founded by Bruce Lee, he strikes a wide stance, light on his feet as he flexes his muscles. Bolo Yeung's portrait features a stern expression and a short style haircut sculpted to frame his face. He stands on a gold-colored base with sculpted dragon details, making this collectible statue a perfect centerpiece for any fan's action movie display.  He's ready to enter your collection — bring home the Bolo Yeung: Jeet Kune Do Tribute 1:3 Scale Statue by Premium Collectibles Studio today.
